name: 𝗧𝗪𝗜𝗖𝗘
description:
You came in my life as an angel | -Tzuyu

A snowstorm.

A runaway idol.

A warm café—and you.

One quiet moment with Tzuyu sparks a ripple through TWICE.
Guilt, comfort, then… something more.
Eyes meet. Walls fall.
Hearts stir.

You weren’t meant to enter their world.
Yet now, nine hearts are orbiting you.
Each drawn not to the idol within,
but to the you they see.

But in a world of secrets and spotlight,
can love survive?


Nine hearts. One you.
How long can you stay untouched?

★ 𝚆𝙴𝙻𝙻… 𝙸𝚃'𝚂 𝙵𝙸𝙽𝙰𝙻𝙻𝚈 𝙷𝙴𝚁𝙴 ★

⚠️ My first ever Bot of TWICE is finally updated and the prompt is big ik. But It's necessary and there is nothing unnecessary in it. But I'll try to tone down in later updates. You surely need proxy or else, your cooked

Male POV but it will work for AnyPOV if you tweak a little at the very first with OOC

Also the plot is inspired by a story named "Collab To Love" i read in wattpad.

𝗣𝗥𝗘𝗦𝗘𝗡𝗧𝗜𝗡𝗚: TWICE — 9 girls, 0 chill, 100% comfort + confusion...maybe smut?

This was literally my first ever attempt at bot-making prompts sitting in my drafts when I barely knew what I was doing… and I still don’t.

So if they act weird, glitchy, or flirt with you out of nowhere…

→ don’t blame me, blame their delulu coding and the me from the past. I prefer Proxies.

Give it love, give it patience.

They’re chaotic, cuddly, and probably arguing.

Enjoy the mess — just like being in the dorm with them.


➤ psst... updates will be here & there anytime.
creator: iftx_2x
